title: Bluecol De-Icer Trigger, 500 ml
features: POWERFUL DE-ICING ACTION: Bluecol Sub-Zero De-Icer is a fast-acting solution designed to effectively defrost windows, preventing freezing even in extreme temperatures.
EXTREME COLD PROTECTION: Effectively defrosts down to as low as -36°C, ensuring your visibility during frigid conditions.
ADVANCED GLASS CLEANING FORMULA: Specially formulated to not only defrost but also clean your glass surfaces for optimal clarity.
CRYSTAL CLEAR, STREAK-FREE SHINE: Enjoy a pristine finish with no streaks or residue for a flawless view every time.
EFFORTLESS APPLICATION: Applying Bluecol Sub-Zero De-Icer is a breeze, making it a quick and convenient solution for icy conditions, so you can get back on the road with minimal effort.
description: Bluecol Trigger De Icer is a fast acting de icer, formulated to effectively defrost windows and help prevent freezing down to -36°C. The high power De Icer also contains a glass cleaner, for better and safer visibility in winter driving conditions. Bluecol Trigger De Icer will not damage or rot rubber seals & wiper blades and will cause no harm to good quality paintwork.
